metadata.title:
v. v. P. TAKES


TIGHTER GRIP

pages.raw_text:
The Washington Water Power
Co. has announced its intention Of
increasing its electric power plants
in this city to 10000 horsepower
by making use of all the water fall
above the Monroe st. bridge. 1t is
proposed to install a $4,000 horse
power plant here and another of
$1,000 horsepower at Post Falls,
Idaho. The steam plant to be built
at Ross park will supply 5000
horsepower To finance this plan
the company proposes to increase
it's capital stock from $5,000,000 to
$4,000, 900 at the coming stock
holders meeting in March. To
what extent this issue will be irri-
gated is not stated.


The new plan contemplates the
Capitalization of the power plants
now used by the company. 1t also
includes the proposed double track
ing of single track lines in this city
AS outlined the scehem will give
the electric monopoly firmer grip
than ever on the power producing
agency that constitutes the great
natural resource Of this city.
